_ww-text_text.en:
Our Founding Mission...

Because we were once students who
were just like you - unsure, and applying to your
dream universities.

We didn't think it was right for college applications
to be so expensive. As a way to give back,

We made DapUp, where successful students who've actually
done it should be your model for success.

It's time to ditch expensive, useless, consultants who don't care.
Transform your dreams into actionable steps. DapUp!

For students. By Students. Truly.

Yours sincerely,
The DapUp Team
Sunny, Sean, and Raymond

DapUp believes every student
deserves university admission success.

No agencies.
No exploitive consultation fees.
Fk Crimson.

University admission success that's fair, NOT a fortune.

﻿

﻿DapUp's Success Team
﻿
Copyright © 2025 DapUp. All rights reserved.
